boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant the temporary read-only audit role for the workspace export request? Focus: current HR offboarding clearance for the requested actor, system, scope, and time window.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact HR clearance record not closed

final_answer: Source records show HR offboarding clearance is missing or mismatched for the exact actor, system, scope, and time window. Policy requires closed boundary before granting access. Tone or routine appearance cannot override. Action must not proceed; escalate for clearance verification.
